cases.prompt: 스프린트 모드로 3가지 방안 비교하고 best case 추천해줘

assertions.text: The response produces a 3-case analysis labeled Conservative, Balanced, and Aggressive.
It recommends the Best case among the three options.
It offers an iterative refinement loop on the chosen case.

cases.prompt: Sprint mode: compare options and iterate on the best case

assertions.text: The response lays out Conservative, Balanced, and Aggressive cases for comparison.
It recommends one case as best and offers to iteratively refine it.
The response runs a three-case Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive analysis.
It recommends the best case and begins an iterative refinement loop.
